HeroSection.title: Turn your passion into a thriving business.
HeroSection.description: Everything you need to sell online, simplified. Create your beautiful store today and start reaching customers on the web and social platforms with ease.
HeroSection.trialInfo: No credit card required • 14-day free trial

FeaturesSection.title: Everything you need to scale
FeaturesSection.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for modern store owners to manage every aspect of their business efficiently.
FeaturesSection.feature1Desc: Real-time stock tracking with low-stock alerts, movement history, and multi-location support.
FeaturesSection.feature2Desc: Customers can browse your store and checkout natively inside Telegram without leaving the app.
FeaturesSection.feature3Desc: Integrated payment processing with dynamic invoicing, automated receipts, and tax calculation.

HowItWorksSection.title: How it Works
HowItWorksSection.subtitle: Get your store up and running in minutes with our simple three-step process.
HowItWorksSection.step1Desc: Sign up and set up your store profile in seconds. No technical knowledge required.
HowItWorksSection.step2Desc: Easily manage inventory, upload photos, and set prices from our intuitive dashboard.
HowItWorksSection.step3Desc: Launch on the web and integrate seamlessly with Telegram to reach your customers where they are.

PricingSection.title: Choose your plan
PricingSection.storefrontDesc: Perfect for getting started and trying out our platform.
PricingSection.proDesc: Everything you need to grow your store and scale your business.
PricingSection.enterpriseDesc: Advanced controls, high volume sales support, and custom options.

FaqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqSection.faq1Question: Can I change my plan later?
FaqSection.faq1Answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your dashboard settings. Changes take effect immediately.
FaqSection.faq2Answer: Yes, all new accounts get a 14-day free trial with full access to Pro features. No credit card required.
FaqSection.faq3Question: What payment methods do you accept?
FaqSection.faq3Answer: We support major credit cards, as well as local payment methods like ABA PayWay and Bakong.
FaqSection.faq4Answer: Yes, we provide email support for all plans, with priority support for Pro and Enterprise users.

ContactSection.title: Get in Touch
ContactSection.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
ContactSection.name: Name
ContactSection.subject: Subject

MarketingFooter.title: Online Shop Platform
MarketingFooter.description: Empowering merchants to sell everywhere. Build your store, manage inventory, and grow your audience seamlessly.
MarketingFooter.copyright: © 2026 Online Shop Platform. All rights reserved.
